zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Kittesford於大約1235年出生在英國薩默塞特吉迪斯福德時，她的父親John de Kittesford27歲，母親Kittesford24歲。她於1260年與John de Sydenham II在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1285年在英國享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Kittesford于大约1235年出生在英国薩默塞特吉迪斯福德时，她的父亲John de Kittesford27岁，母亲Kittesford24岁。她于1260年与John de Sydenham II在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1285年在英国享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

nameMeanings.name: de

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Kittesford was born about 1235, in Kittisford, Somerset, England, her father, John de Kittesford, was 27 and her mother, Kittesford, was 24. She married John de Sydenham II in 1260, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1285, in England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Kittesford est née environ 1235, à Kittisford, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John de Kittesford, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Kittesford, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John de Sydenham II en 1260, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1285, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Kittesford um 1235 in Kittisford, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Kittesford 27 und ihre Mutter Kittesford 24. Sie hat 1260 in Somerset, England John de Sydenham II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1285 im Alter von 51 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Kittesford è nata il circa 1235 nel Kittisford, Somerset, England, sua padre, John de Kittesford, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Kittesford, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John de Sydenham II nel 1260, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1285, nel England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Kittesfordが約1235年にイギリスソメルセトキッティスフォードで生まれた時，父John de Kittesfordは27歳，母Kittesfordは24歳であった。1260年にイギリスソメルセトでJohn de Sydenham IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1285年にイギリスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Kittesford(이)가 대략 1235년 영국 서머세트 키티스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Kittesford(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Kittesford(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1260년 영국 서머세트에서 John de Sydenham II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 영국에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.between January 8, 1238 and January 6, 1: de 8 de janeiro de 1238 a 6 de janeiro de 1241
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Kittesford nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Kittisford, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Kittesford, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Kittesford, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Sydenham II em 1260, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1285, em Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Kittesford родилась около 1235 г. в местности киттисфорд, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Kittesford было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Kittesford, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Sydenham II в 1260 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1285 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 51 год.

Se casó con John de Sydenham II en 1260, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1285, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
